notes: The source page references the Masthead ad format as a reservation campaign subtype available on YouTube and Google TV, used to 'drive mass reach and awareness with a prominent ad placement.' Detailed technical specifications are not provided in this source; they are covered in a separate article at https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/14117675 (YouTube CPM Masthead) and https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/9709826. The format requires activation through a Google Representative and is purchased via reservation (CPM basis).
